description: Firm Liquidity & Capacity Monitor - measures every firm-book position in days-to-liquidate at a 20% participation cap, buckets the book into liquidity tiers, scores firm liquidity 0-100 and surfaces the trapped illiquid tail. data/liquidity-capacity.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Liquidity & Capacity Monitor - daily 02:00 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler, after the Firm Book and Risk Monitor publish, so book liquidity is measured on a fresh consolidated book.
